name: paper
description: /paper <args> — arxiv-style LaTeX paper scaffolder. Verbs: new <slug> (scaffold template/ skeleton at ./<slug>/) · sample <slug> (copy the bundled demiurge sample-nb-bcs-absorbed verbatim, an arxiv-quality reference exhibit) · fig <size> <prompt-file> <out-png> (fal.ai gpt-image-2 queue+poll, uses `secret get fal.api_key`) · compile [dir] (pdflatex × 3 + bibtex) · list (bundled samples) · help. Template is a minimal arxiv-style single-column 11pt skeleton (main.tex + references.bib + Makefile + README.md + figures/_prompts/).
